top_signals.title: Asian Stocks Drop as Kospi Hit by Selloff in Chips: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Semiconductor stocks tumbled across Asia, dragging regional equities lower, as investors became more skeptical that the artificial intelligence-driven rally can withstand lofty valuations. Oil climbed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Young Japanese who rode AI boom flaunt wealth with luxury buys
top_signals.summary: The shopping spree also reveals a deepening societal divide, exposing the increasingly uneven nature of Japan's economic revival.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
